title: Butler chunk task
description: Logical shape of a chunk — a child task (one focused sitting) under a parent work unit. The agent builds this, then maps it onto TickTick fields per references/template.md. Real subtask (parentId), never a checklist item, so it can carry its own dates/reminders/focus estimate.

else.$comment: Personal chunks SHALL NOT carry the work axes.

id.description: Stable local id used by the packer.

context.description: The task's context (derived from its TickTick project, confirmed with the user). work = full pipeline model (stage/intensity/ai_discount/est0 required); personal = lightweight (priority + est0 + reminder, no work axes). A chunk read with NO context field is treated as `work` for 0.2.0 back-compat — that defaulting is a reader rule applied by the skills, so newly generated chunks MUST set this field.

title.description: Stage label + short qualifier, sentence case. e.g. 'Backend: pricer API + carry-back'. No ticket prefix, no emoji, no trailing period. Code identifiers verbatim. The concrete first action lives in the body, not the title. See task-contract.md.

stage.description: Work context only. Pipeline stage (see config.yaml `contexts.work.pipeline`). The decomposition unit, the calibration reference class, and the SINGLE SOURCE for the derived activity bucket the packer clusters by. Not a TickTick tag. Intake picks applicable stages and may add ad-hoc chunks for off-pipeline work.

intensity.description: Work context only. Freshness axis: the ONE hand-set work-shape tag. deep = needs a fresh slot; shallow = light. Defaults come from the stage (config `contexts.work.pipeline`) but are overridable per chunk. A deep code review or verifying coupled AI output is `deep` — judge the focus it demands, not the activity.

ai_discount.description: Work context only. Defaults from the stage; override per chunk. discounted = AI compresses this (build on understood code, mechanical refactor, codemod). none/premium = AI does not reliably help and may slow you (ambiguous-spec resolution, cross-system trace/debug, decisions needing people, reviewing AI output). Used for estimation; calibration crosses stage x ai_discount for research/backend.

est0_min.description: IMMUTABLE original focus-minute estimate, set once at intake (during decomposition) and never overwritten on reschedule. The anchor for calibration (compare against actual focus time, grouped by stage). Required for work chunks; optional for personal chunks (a light estimate, no calibration).

priority.description: Commitment tag, set only when the chunk is scheduled for the target day; null otherwise.

why.description: One line, only if not obvious from the title.

ref.description: PR / issue / ticket URL or id where deep context lives.

scheduled.description: True only for the target day's chunks. Scheduled chunks get start/due, timeZone, reminder, and a pomo estimate; all others stay dateless.

block.description: From the packer output; maps to TickTick startDate/dueDate.

pomo_estimate.description: Work context only. Maps to TickTick focusSummaries[].estimatedPomo. Personal chunks bypass the packer and carry no pomo estimate.

due.description: Personal due time; maps to TickTick dueDate (isAllDay:false) and is the reminder's date anchor. Chosen conversationally, or derived from a live read of the day on defer.

trigger.description: TRIGGER string, e.g. 'TRIGGER:PT0S' (at due) or 'TRIGGER:-PT30M' (before). Maps to TickTick reminders[].

reminder.description: Light personal scheduling: a due time + reminder. Personal chunks bypass the packer entirely (no block, no pomo, no intensity). Set only when the personal chunk is scheduled for the target day.

ad_hoc.description: True when this chunk is off-pipeline (no matching stage) — the hybrid escape hatch. Stage still required; pick the closest, or 'backend' as a neutral default.

parent_ticket.description: The parent work unit's ticket (or a local ref when there is no ticket). Resolved to TickTick parentId at write time.
